div.p: Context: Asynchronous I/O Runtime (Reactor/Executor Pattern) Objective: Minimize thread blocking by yielding control to the scheduler on EAGAIN.

text.tspan: ① Call syscall: read(fd, buf, len)

g.title: Attempts to drain the kernel RX buffer into user-space 'buf'.
Contains state for unparking the specific task.

ol.li: Packet arrives at NIC → NIC raises Hard IRQ.
CPU executes Soft IRQ → TCP Stack validates Checksum/Seq.
epoll_wait in Reactor thread returns with fd.

g.text: Non-blocking Read State Machine | Engineer: Technical Design Artist | Spec v1.4.2

g.title: Attempts to drain the kernel RX buffer into user-space 'buf'.
Contains state for unparking the specific task.
